select
distinct
from dbo.ops_ro_barcode
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_ro_barcode (id, ro_id, ro_item, InvoiceNo, warehouse_code, barCode, package_code, modelno, qty, orderNo, itemNo, splitItemNo, SN, scan, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, scanTime, num, ass_num, invoiceId) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{roId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{barcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{packageCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{orderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splititemno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scan,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{scantime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{invoiceid,jdbcType=BIGINT})

where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
